Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}If you or another party member is in bad shape, then recover using healing skills or items.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}It'd be wise to make a habit of checking everyone's status before entering battles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Press the {f 1 3 112} button to open the menu. From there, you can recover HP with skills and items.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can use your allies' skills from there as well, so feel free to do so, but keep an eye on their SP.[n]{f 1 1}
